---
title: "Visualization Code"
---

Visualization and simulation code is organized by lecture, with one directory per lecture.

## Lecture code directories

- [Lecture 01 directory](lecture-01-introduction/README.md)
- [Lecture 01 workspace plot script](lecture-01-introduction/workspace_plot.py)

## Suggested convention

- `code/lecture-XX-topic/` for lecture-specific materials
- `code/shared/` for reusable utilities
- Include a short `README.md` in each directory
